title: Great so far!
text: So far it’s been pretty simple to work and be set up. The touch screen feature works well. Looking forward to continuing see how it works, especially the swim feature and checking to see how well and how long it holds up to the water. I like the tightness of the band and the sleek feature of the watch’s face. I haven’t worn it long enough to check the life of the battery and how long it lasts whilst checking out all its additional features. I will be adding an update when I’ve had time to wear the watch a little longer. I’ve liked most of the reviews and based my purchase on what others wrote. Bonus is the extended one year warranty that comes in the package.

title: Great Semi-Smart Watch
text: My SmartWatch was too fragile and I needed something durable and waterproof that would work for phone calls and text messages and other notifications. I lead groups on trips tivities where I often get wet and there is a lot of background noise. I needed something that would notify me a phone calls or text messages from other adult staff or parents and that could handle the water and activities. This has been a very affordable lifesaver.

title: This watch is amazing for the price.
text:
This watch is fantastic for less than $30.00! I love how it has an alarm, water resistant, you can chime your phone from your watch, changing watch faces, get texts and see incoming calls. I am not able to answer the call from my phone but I am impressed with all it does.

I was going to get another type of watch like a fitbit however I saw pictures taken of people who had their wrist burned! Nothing like that with this watch for a 1/4 of the price. Very nice. I'm very happy with it and would highly recommend it.

title: Great Deal
text: I wanted this for the watch & step counter. Actually pretty impressive for the price.  Lots of options for the price. I've had it a few weeks with no issues.

title: Basic Smartwatch
text:
**Update: The seller is excellent at customer service and really wanting customers to be happy. They reached out to me, offering to send a replacement or different model. Very impressed with the care of customer experiences and expectations.** I've updated my star review based on excellent customer service and with no prompts from the seller to do so. (If they had asked I'd be more inclined to lower my rating, but really impressed with the commination and attempts to make a happy customer)

This is a very basic smartwatch with extremely limited capabilities. If something malfunctions or doesn't work at all, there are no options to adjust settings or to reset that feature. I got this with intent to keep track of heart beats, body temperature, sleep quality, and activity level performance.

The app is great as being able to adjust what you give permissions for (I didn't want to get phone notifications but may have changed that option later), but unfortunately the step

title: Great watch!!
text: This watch has a long battery life, waterproof, easy to charge, fast charge, and overall great watch. Features are pictured and I haven't had any problems with this watch. I love it.

title: En un día se apagó y ya no funcionó más no lo recomiendo pésimo articulo
text: Batería no funciona no carga está apagado el reloj en un día de uso se murió el reloj..pésimo articulo

title: Excellent Buy :This Watch took me by Surprise on Quality and true High end technology for the Price
text: Excellent quality  and  great buy for the price NOT LIKE some of the other low cost smart watches.  I can honestly say I have purchased budget Smart Watches in the pass and This one is by far the best one compared to getting a  $200.00 plus  Apple or Android Galaxy Smart Watch,  I'm totally surprised it's only 30.00 bucks SMH...easily worth $100 plus...just the quality and the build tells alot about what your going to get in the IOWODO watch don't be fooled by the Name and the Price, I just took a chance and said I'll just return it like the others but this one is a keeper!

title: Units
text: No American units pounds, inches, miles.

title: Not as advertised
text: I give this a one star due to what is advertised is not what I received. The R3 dose not monitor spo2 or temp as it advised which is why I purchased this particular watch. I returned this watch before i could fully asses anything else the watch advertises.

title: Super cute, wish it lasted....
text: This watch was super cute and I really enjoyed it until it died. Now it won't charge and won't come back on. Very disappointed

title: Great Smart Watch
text:
Features:

✔ Customized Dials ✔ Notification Reminder ✔ Activity & Fitness Tracker ✔ 5ATM Waterproof

✔ Heart Rate Monitor ✔ Sleep Monitor ✔ Sedentary Reminder ✔ Breathing Relaxation Guides

✔ Long Battery Life ✔ Find phone ✔ Up to 10 alarm clocks ✔ Music Control

✔ Stop Watch & Timer ✔ Adjustable Brightness ✔ Changeable Bands ✔ Full Touch Colorfull Screen

Specification:

Recommended FREE Official APP: Glory Fit
Supported APP: Apple health, Google Fit, Strava etc.
Display Type: 1.54 inch TFT HD-LCD full touch color screen
Dial Measurement: diameter 36mm, thickness 11mm
Resolution: 240*240 pixel
Strap Width: 20mm, 0.78 inch
Suitable for wrist circumferences: 160-235mm, 6.29-9.25 inch
Weight: 38g (without strap)

title: Don't waste your money it's really bad
text:
I receive it and returned it the same day... The app to use for this product is different than the app listed in the manule. Once you buy this product the seller will send you an email via Amazon telling you to use H Hubb app instead the one listed at the manule which is a different app. Then will tell you to scan the code to make it pair. Well, there is no scanning cod feature in that app.
Then after 15 minutes, the hand band fall off from the main watch. I tried to get it back but seems no way. This is a very cheap low quality made type. Don't waste your money.
